title: lasianthus hookeri var. hookeri
intro: Lasianthus hookeri var. hookeri, also known as Hooker's Lasianthus, is a plant species belonging to the family Theaceae. It is a shrub native to the Himalayas and Southeast Asia, valued for its medicinal properties. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of Lasianthus hookeri var. hookeri include decoctions and infusions, which are used to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and other respiratory issues.
